faqs.question: How does Bond work?
faqs.answer: Bond connects you instantly to trained safety agents who can monitor your location, hear your surroundings, and coordinate emergency response if needed. Simply activate the app when you need protection.

faqs.question: What happens when I activate Bond?
faqs.answer: Within seconds, a trained safety agent is connected to you. They can see your location, hear what's happening around you, and stay with you until you're safe. If needed, they'll coordinate with local emergency services.

faqs.question: Can my family members track each other?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our Family Circle feature allows family members to share locations and safety status with each other. Parents can monitor teens, adult children can check on elderly parents, and everyone has peace of mind.

faqs.question: How much does it cost?
faqs.answer: We offer flexible pricing plans starting at $9.99/month for individuals and family plans starting at $19.99/month. All plans include 24/7 agent access and unlimited usage.

faqs.question: Is my information private and secure?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use bank-level encryption for all data. Your location and information are only shared with safety agents when you actively request help, and we never sell your data to third parties.

faqs.question: What if I accidentally activate it?
faqs.answer: No problem! You can easily cancel a session. The agent will quickly verify it was accidental and close the session. There's no penalty for accidental activations.

faqs.question: Does it work everywhere?
faqs.answer: Bond works anywhere you have cellular or WiFi service. Our agents can coordinate emergency response in any location within the United States.

faqs.question: Can I use it for my elderly parents?
faqs.answer: Yes! Many families use Bond to protect elderly parents. The simple one-button interface works great for seniors, and family members can receive alerts and monitor safety status.
